_comment: Official Stripe MCP server (@stripe/mcp), local stdio. Read-only is enforced by a RESTRICTED API KEY scoped Read-only (rk_...) — writes are 403'd at the Stripe API (see SETUP.md). Provide STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (set to your restricted read-only key) via the environment, never committed config. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
